changes: Day 35 evening sync: (1) NEW EVENT: Former FM Kharazi seriously injured, wife killed in Tehran airstrike Apr 1 — diplomacy via Pakistan derailed. (2) NEW EVENT: Hengam Island (strategic Hormuz island) struck by airstrikes — 7 injured. (3) UK 35-NATION SUMMIT: 35 countries issued joint statement condemning Iran's Hormuz closure; military planners to evaluate post-conflict naval options; US excluded. (4) SHIPPING DATA: March oil loadings west of Hormuz declined 76% (5.28M bpd vs 22.2M bpd Feb) — Windward Maritime Intelligence. (5) NEW FM: LyondellBasell declared FM on European polyolefins supply (fm-028) due to naphtha cost surge. (6) OIL PRICES: Brent at $105.27; Brent-WTI spread collapsed to 2026 lows; war premium deflating; EIA forecasts Brent above $95/b next 2 months. (7) RYANAIR: CEO warns 25% of European jet fuel at risk from May if conflict continues. (8) Updated energy-news-data.json headlines for Iran, Saudi, UAE, Qatar, Bahrain, US, South Korea.
newEvents: Former FM Kharazi seriously injured, wife killed in Tehran strike — diplomacy via Pakistan/Vance channel derailed (Al Arabiya)

March oil loadings west of Hormuz declined 76% to 5.28M bpd (Windward Maritime Intelligence)
LyondellBasell FM on European polyolefins — naphtha cost surge $250-300/mt (ChemOrbis)
Brent at $105.27; Brent-WTI spread at 2026 lows on de-escalation signals (EIA, ActionForex)
Ryanair CEO: 25% of European jet fuel at risk from May (Irish Times, Investing.com)
CENTCOM cumulative: 19 Iranian ships, 1 submarine, ~2,000 targets destroyed (Stars and Stripes)
noNewFmReason: One new FM added: LyondellBasell (fm-028) on European polyolefins, declared Mar 11 but not previously captured. Total FM count now 27. All existing FMs remain active. Ryanair flagged potential flight cancellations Jun-Aug if jet fuel supply disrupted.
